wolf_cull.name: Thin The Wolves
wolf_cull.description: Cull the Timber Wolves threatening the road.

not_started.text: The Timber Wolves have grown bold, threatening travelers on the forest road. We need someone brave enough to thin their numbers.

active.text: Wolves slain {progress}. Keep at it, the road must be safe.

ready_to_turn_in.text: You've done it! The road is safer now. Here is your reward.

completed.text: The road is safer thanks to you.

boar_menace.name: The Boar Menace
boar_menace.description: The wild boars in the deeper woods are destroying crops. Hunt them down.

not_started.text: You proved yourself against the wolves. Now I need your help with a bigger problem. Wild boars from the Darkwood are destroying our crops and injuring farmers.

active.text: Boars slain {progress}. The farmers will be grateful.

ready_to_turn_in.text: The farmers can rest easy now. You've earned this.

completed.text: The crops are safe. You've been a great help to Eldengrove.

bandit_scouts.name: Bandit Scouts
bandit_scouts.description: Deal with the bandit scouts lurking in the Darkwood.

not_started.text: Our scouts report bandit activity deep in the Darkwood. They're watching our trade routes. Find them and put an end to their reconnaissance.

active.text: Bandits eliminated {progress}. Every one less is a safer road.

ready_to_turn_in.text: Excellent work. Those scouts won't be reporting back. Take this as thanks from the guard.

completed.text: The roads are quiet for now, but stay vigilant.
